response.justification: Solid full-stack engineering background spanning roughly 14 years with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires Principal/Director-level AI strategy expertise with recognized AI products and platform leadership, which the resume does not demonstrate. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling work, and there is no evidence of cloud/AI strategy leadership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Long polyglot engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Founder experience with GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive
Community leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products built
Title and scope (Senior/Staff IC) below Principal/Director-level expectations
Limited evidence of cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering and entrepreneurial experience
